privateBrowsing.warning: Limited browser storage detected (often in private or incognito mode). Your progress may not persist after you close this tab.

morning.title: Phase 1: Face the Abyss
morning.subtitle: Define what you refuse and what you are moving toward.
morning.antiVisionDescription: What is the dull and persistent dissatisfaction you've learned to live with? What does your life look like in 5 years if absolutely nothing changes?
morning.antiVisionExample: I wake up exhausted, commute 1 hour to a job I hate, and spend my evenings numbing myself with Netflix. I never take risks and watch others live my dreams.
morning.visionDescription: If you could snap your fingers and be living a different life in three years, what do you actually want? What does an average Tuesday look like?
morning.visionExample: I wake up without an alarm, spend 2 hours writing or building my own business, and have the freedom to travel and work from anywhere.

daytime.title: Phase 2: Shatter the Illusion
daytime.subtitle: Four short checkpoints keep the protocol present while you work.
daytime.scheduleIntro: You will get four reminders today at:
daytime.calendarHint: Download the calendar file and import it into your calendar app. Each event links back here so you can answer the prompt in this tab.

evening.title: Phase 3: Forge the New Self
evening.subtitle: Review what surfaced today, then lock in your game plan.
evening.missionDescription: What would have to be true in one year for you to know you’ve broken the old pattern? One concrete thing.
evening.missionExample: Launch my independent business and get my first 10 paying customers.
evening.bossFightDescription: What do you need to learn or build this month that will move you closer to the one-year goal?
evening.bossFightExample: Build the MVP of my product and set up a landing page.
evening.questsDescription: What are 2-3 needle-moving actions you can timeblock tomorrow that the person you’re becoming would simply do? (One per line)
evening.questsExample:
Write for 1 hour
Code for 2 hours
Exercise for 30 mins
evening.rulesDescription: What are you not willing to sacrifice to achieve your vision?
evening.rulesExample: No working past 8 PM. Always prioritize 8 hours of sleep.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.questsEmpty: No daily quests yet. Edit them in your saved plan or complete the evening step again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dataDescription: Export a JSON backup to move devices or keep a copy. Import replaces the active protocol and archive history in this browser.
settings.importReadError: Could not read the selected file.
settings.rebootDescription: Archive your current protocol and start the wizard again. Previous runs stay in local archives inside your backup export.
settings.confirmRebootBody: Your current protocol will be saved to archives and cleared. Continue?

reflect.title: Daytime interrupt
reflect.invalid: This link is missing a valid question (use ?q=1, ?q=2, or ?q=3).
reflect.answerDescription: Answer honestly; it is saved only in this browser.

questions.1: What am I avoiding right now by doing what I'm doing?
questions.2: If someone filmed the last two hours, what would they conclude I want from my life?
questions.3: Am I moving toward the life I hate or the life I want?
questions.4: Evening Synthesis: Review what surfaced today, then lock in your game plan.
